title: PortableNote Block
description: The atomic unit of knowledge. A named, content-bearing entity stored as a single file in the vault's blocks/ directory.

id.description: Permanent block identity. UUID v4. Never changes.

name.description: Human-readable name. Vault-wide unique (case-insensitive). Used as display text in block-reference links.

content.description: Block body. For markdown format: CommonMark compliant, no heading syntax outside fenced code blocks. LF line endings.

modified.description: ISO 8601 last modification timestamp. Updated on every content mutation.
